overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city district featuring neon-lit streets, Asian-inspired architecture, and wet reflective surfaces. The character navigates from covered sidewalks across busy intersections, through narrow neon alleys, and up to elevated walkways, showcasing dense urban commercial environments with holographic advertisements and mixed pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial sidewalk beneath a concrete awning, with traditional red lanterns hanging overhead and a dense cluster of neon billboards visible in the distance. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding lights as pedestrians pass by and vehicles drive along the adjacent street.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an open urban intersection, crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk while navigating between moving vehicles. The tall apartment block rises on the right as traffic flows through the intersection, with the neon billboard cluster now visible in the distance to the left.

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow covered alleyway where the lighting shifts to vibrant neon colors, with red lanterns hanging overhead and a bright pink neon sign glowing on the right. The enclosed space features vending machines along the walls and a person browsing at a food dispenser while the open street falls behind.

The industrial scaffolding rises on the left while an elevated roadway runs along the right, with the sky becoming more visible as the covered alley falls behind.

The area features industrial elements including a dumpster and metal stairs, with the scaffolding now closer on the left and no other pedestrians visible in this secluded elevated space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling, neon-lit commercial street into a secluded industrial heights. It begins beneath a concrete awning adorned with red lanterns, moving along wet pavements that reflect the glow of distant billboards before emerging into a wide urban intersection. As the camera crosses the yellow-striped street and passes illuminated vending machines, the open cityscape narrows into a vibrant, neon-drenched alleyway filled with pink signs and food dispensers. The scene then shifts from the enclosed alley toward a concrete staircase with red railings, ascending past industrial scaffolding and an elevated roadway. Finally, the camera moves along an elevated platform toward a dead end, where the urban noise fades and the view terminates at a large, colorful graffiti mural on a secluded wall.
